mapper.select: SELECT f.board_id as boardId, /* DB 컬럼명이 member_id2라면 f.member_id2로 수정해야 합니다 */ f.member_id as memberId, f.category, f.title, f.content, f.thumbnail_url as thumbnailUrl, f.view_count as viewCount, f.like_count as likeCount, f.reply_count as replyCount, TO_CHAR(f.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as createdAt, m2.nickname, m2.profile_image as profilePhoto FROM freeboard f LEFT JOIN member1 m1 ON f.member_id = m1.member_id LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON f.member_id = m2.member_id ORDER BY f.board_id DESC

SELECT f.board_id as boardId, f.member_id as memberId, f.category, f.title, f.content, f.thumbnail_url as thumbnailUrl, f.view_count as viewCount, f.like_count as likeCount, f.reply_count as replyCount, TO_CHAR(f.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as createdAt, m2.nickname, m2.profile_image as profilePhoto FROM freeboard f LEFT JOIN member1 m1 ON f.member_id = m1.member_id LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON f.member_id = m2.member_id WHERE f.category = #{category} ORDER BY f.board_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE freeboard SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id as commentId, c.board_id as boardId, c.member_id as memberId, c.content, TO_CHAR(c.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as createdAt, m2.nickname, m2.profile_image as profilePhoto FROM freeboard_comment c LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON c.member_id = m2.member_id WHERE c.board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY c.comment_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE freeboard SET reply_count = reply_count + 1 WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.select: SELECT like_count FROM freeboard WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE target_id = #{boardId} AND member_id = #{memberId} AND target_type = 'FREEBOARD'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes (like_id, member_id, target_id, target_type, created_at) VALUES (SEQ_LIKES_ID.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{boardId}, 'FREEBOARD', SYSDATE)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM likes WHERE target_id = #{boardId} AND member_id = #{memberId} AND target_type = 'FREEBOARD'
mapper.select: SELECT member_id FROM freeboard WHERE board_id = #{boardId}

SELECT f.*, m2.nickname, m2.profile_image as profilePhoto, t.trip_name as tripName, TO_CHAR(t.start_date, 'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(t.end_date, 'YYYY.MM.DD') as tripDate FROM freeboard f JOIN member2 m2 ON f.member_id = m2.member_id LEFT JOIN trip t ON f.trip_id = t.trip_id WHERE f.board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.update: UPDATE freeboard SET category = #{category}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, trip_id = #{tripId} WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
